command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 'cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && python3 -c "
import json, datetime, subprocess
from pathlib import Path
JOB = \"phase9e10-runtime-candidate-20260621T203012Z-03cfe2\"
RUN = \"bg-20260623T215532Z-419b7e44\"
WS = Path(\"memory/execution-pipeline/governed\") / JOB / \"_background\" / RUN

print(\"=STATE=\")
sp = WS / \"run-state.json\"
if sp.is_file():
    d = json.loads(sp.read_text())
    print(\"status:\", d.get(\"status\"))
    print(\"wave11_version:\", d.get(\"wave11_version\"))
    print(\"lease_expires_at:\", d.get(\"lease_expires_at\"))
    print(\"completed_at:\", d.get(\"completed_at\"))
    print(\"ok:\", d.get(\"ok\"))
    print(\"error:\", str(d.get(\"error\",\"\"))[:200])

print(\"=HB=\")
hp = WS / \"heartbeat-liveness.json\"
if hp.is_file():
    hb = json.loads(hp.read_text())
    ts_str = hb.get(\"ts\",\"\")
    hb_age = 9999
    if ts_str:
        ts_dt = datetime.datetime.fromisoformat(ts_str.replace(\"Z\",\"+00:00\"))
        hb_age = round((datetime.datetime.now(datetime.timezone.utc)-ts_dt).total_seconds(),1)
    print(\"hb_count:\", hb.get(\"hb_count\"))
    print(\"stage:\", hb.get(\"stage\"))
    print(\"wave11_version:\", hb.get(\"wave11_version\"))
    print(\"hb_age_s:\", hb_age)
    print(\"final:\", hb.get(\"final\"))

print(\"=PID=\")
r = subprocess.run([\"kill\",\"-0\",\"75729\"], capture_output=True)
print(\"ALIVE\" if r.returncode==0 else \"DEAD\")

print(\"=STREAM=\")
sa = WS / \"stream-activity.json\"
if sa.is_file():
    d = json.loads(sa.read_text())
    print(\"model:\", d.get(\"model\"))
    print(\"status:\", d.get(\"status\"))
    print(\"started_at:\", d.get(\"model_request_started_at\"))
    print(\"completed_at:\", d.get(\"model_request_completed_at\"))
    print(\"failed_at:\", d.get(\"model_request_failed_at\"))
    print(\"chunk_count:\", d.get(\"chunk_count\"))
    print(\"last_chunk_at:\", d.get(\"last_chunk_at\"))
else:
    print(\"none\")

print(\"=LEDGER TAIL=\")
lp = WS / \"event-ledger.ndjson\"
if lp.is_file():
    lines = lp.read_text().strip().split(\"\n\")
    for l in lines[-6:]: print(l)

print(\"=PHASE RESULT=\")
rp = WS / \"phase-result.json\"
if rp.is_file():
    d = json.loads(rp.read_text())
    print(\"ok:\", d.get(\"ok\"))
    print(\"summary:\", str(d.get(\"summary\",\"\"))[:150])
else:
    print(\"none\")

print(\"=PHASE ERROR=\")
ep = WS / \"phase-error.json\"
if ep.is_file():
    d = json.loads(ep.read_text())
    print(\"error_type:\", d.get(\"error_type\"))
    print(\"error:\", str(d.get(\"error\",\"\"))[:200])
else:
    print(\"none\")
" 2>&1'
